properties.entry: The application crashes when a user clicks the Help button before the UI is fully rendered. Needs a quick fix before the presentation!

💬 dev (09.05.2026): I swear it worked perfectly on my machine...
💬 psp (10.05.2026): You forgot to initialize the button.
Refactor the spaghetti code into a clean Model-View-Controller pattern. Professor Shao Jü Woo will be checking the Object Orientation strictly!

💬 adm (03.05.2026): Are we sure we really need MVC for this? It's getting complicated.
💬 psp (05.05.2026): Yes, unless you want to lose 10% on the grading criteria! Let's get it done.
The dev team is running out of caffeine.

💬 adm (10.05.2026): On my way. Do we need snacks too?
💬 dev (10.05.2026): Bring pizza or don't come back.
